records.ety: [Gr. <?/ beginning beforehand. fr. <?/ to begin first; <?/ before + <?/ to begin; <?/ intens. + <?/ to begin: cf. F. procatarctique. ]

quotes: The physician inquires into the procatarctic causes.
notes: ☞ The words procatarctic causes have been used with different significations. Thus they have been employed synonymously with prime causes, exciting causes, and predisposing or remote causes.
